nodes.name: Hybrid Router (Rules First)
nodes.notes:
FAQ exact match = no AI cost
Product lookup = no AI cost
Tracking lookup = no AI cost
AI Agent only runs on fallback/direct complex questions

nodes.name: FAQ + Product Search (No AI)
nodes.notes:
FAQ exact match = no AI cost
Product lookup = no AI cost
Only passes to AI if neither FAQ nor Products match

options.systemMessage: You are a friendly customer support assistant for a clothing brand. Your job is to help with general style advice, sizing guidance, and store-related questions. RULES: 1) Keep answers short (under 200 words). 2) Do NOT invent product names, prices, stock levels, or delivery dates. 3) Do NOT provide order status or tracking info — tell the customer to ask 'track my order ORD-XXXXX'. 4) Do NOT process refunds or complaints — tell the customer to say 'speak to a human'. 5) If you are unsure, recommend the customer speak with our support team. 6) Stay within clothing brand support topics only.

nodes.name: AI Agent (Fallback Only)
nodes.notes:
AI Agent only runs on fallback/direct complex questions
This saves cost by handling FAQ, products, and tracking without AI
